hooks.command: input=$(cat); pattern=$(echo "$input" | grep -oE '(rm -rf|git reset --hard|git clean -fd|git checkout -- \.|git push.*(--force|-f))' || true); if [ -n "$pattern" ]; then echo "WARNING: Destructive command detected: $pattern"; fi

count_file=/tmp/agent-bureau-edit-count; count=$(cat "$count_file" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); count=$((count + 1)); echo "$count" > "$count_file"; if [ "$count" -eq 5 ] || [ "$count" -eq 10 ] || [ "$count" -eq 20 ]; then echo "You have made $count file edits. Consider running /verify quick."; fi

modified=$(git diff HEAD --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep '\.ts$' || true); if [ -n "$modified" ]; then found=''; for f in $modified; do if [ -f "$f" ]; then matches=$(grep -n 'console\.log' "$f" 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$matches" ]; then found="${found}${f}:
${matches}
"; fi; fi; done; if [ -n "$found" ]; then printf 'console.log found in modified files:
'; printf '%b
' "$found"; fi; fi
